questions.description: Does at least one of the top-5 retrieved chunks overlap a gold span?
questions.scope_guardrail: Do not penalize the retriever for ranking when at least one relevant chunk is in top-k. Rank quality is measured separately by MRR.

questions.description: What fraction of the top-5 retrieved chunks overlap a gold span?
questions.scope_guardrail: Precision under 1.0 is acceptable if recall is high - the generator can filter noise. Use this metric for trend tracking, not pass/fail.

questions.description: Mean Reciprocal Rank - measures how highly the first relevant chunk is ranked
questions.scope_guardrail: MRR is sensitive to the rank of the first relevant result. Use this for ranking quality assessment.

questions.description: Character-level F1 overlap between retrieved chunks and gold spans
questions.scope_guardrail: Measures how well retrieved chunks cover the gold answer text, accounting for both precision and recall.
